title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including exploding token consumption costs, low shipping rates (18% of tokens for shipped products), and concerns about circular investment dynamics. The episode covers Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, AI trading applications at Robinhood, and privacy considerations around connecting personal accounts to AI services.
